g4_revenue_trend.description: Traditional TV declining, streaming only 14.7% of revenue

g5_gross_margin_trend.description: Margins under pressure from streaming investment

g7_moat.description: Paramount+ at 32.8M subs vs Netflix 220M. Traditional TV franchise eroding, streaming moat nonexistent. True liability $44.6B (10x OIBDA) including $32.6B off-balance-sheet content commitments.

actual_result: Lost $1.6B, sold entire position 2024, Buffett admitted mistake
key_insight: FCF/NI of 0.13 is a hard veto — when earnings are 7x higher than cash generation, the profits are fiction.
